entities.name: NIR SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A spectroscopic technique used as a gateway to study the physiology of nutritional traits in crops

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGY
entities.description: The biological functions and processes of living organisms, specifically in the context of nutritional traits

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that determine their nutritional value

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Cultivated plants used for food or other purposes

entities.name: NUTRITION-SENSITIVITY OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The integration of nutrition goals into agricultural investments and commitments

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Actions or programs implemented to improve agricultural outcomes and nutrition

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The state of macro and micro nutrient intake and utilization in the body

entities.name: HIDDEN HUNGER
entities.description: A form of undernutrition characterized by a deficiency of essential micronutrients

relationships.description: used to analyze the physiology of nutritional traits
